channel.title: Tutorial on PostDoc Problems
channel.description: Recent content in Tutorial on PostDoc Problems

item.title: Short tactics tutorial
item.description:
I have always wanted to learn tactics writing in Lean. But for whatever reason, none of the tutorials that exist online have been helpful. I suspect that the best way to learn to write tactics to play around and modify the existing ones. I came across this short, 4-page tactics tutorial that looks promising. I’ll give it a go when I get some time.

  • https://www.vladasedlacek.cz/en/posts/lean-01-intro
  • https://www.vladasedlacek.cz/en/posts/lean-02-demo
  • https://www.vladasedlacek.cz/en/posts/lean-03-tactics
  • https://www.vladasedlacek.cz/en/posts/lean-04-linperm
